calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for and with Kathy Nakagawa.

Mr. Wallis stated that the accounts were community property accounts, that the Broker could only divide the bonds in increments of $1,000.00, that the Husband had control of the assets and that he was advised to take half but he took 100% of the income. In addition, he stated that Mr. Rankin would return the funds to the estate using the funds from the payment he is to receive from the Sausalito Yatch Harbor. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court) based on the payment plan.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
